_comment: PRD-006 package delivery — customer email nodes. Attach on the spec_sheet.sent branch AFTER a channel filter (payload.channel === 'package') and the recipient_source guard (=== 'contact'). Two nodes: fetch the signed PDF, then send it. Field expressions read from the 'Verify signature' node, which returns the envelope body (so $json.payload.* is available). From-address = the address/alias on the connected Gmail credential (set it to contact@solux-light.com); n8n cannot override the authenticated sender, only senderName + reply-to.

parameters.subject: =Solux quotation {{ $('Verify signature').item.json.payload.quote_number }} — offer and technical datasheets
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $('Verify signature').item.json.payload.recipient_name || $('Verify signature').item.json.payload.client_name || 'Sir or Madam' }},

Thank you for your interest in Solux lighting. Please find attached our quotation {{ $('Verify signature').item.json.payload.quote_number }}, together with the technical datasheet for each quoted product — combined into a single PDF for your convenience.

If you have any questions about the offer or the specifications, simply reply to this email and our team will be glad to help.

Kind regards,
Solux Sales
contact@solux-light.com | www.solux-light.com
